title: Protein expression in Bacillus subtilis
author: Kristoffer Bach Falkenberg
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdmui46w

steps.title: Prepare a stock solution of 2
steps.instruction: Prepare a stock solution of 2.0g/L Na 2 MoO 4 . Sterilize by filtration

steps.title: Add a magnetic stirrer to the...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic stirrer to the blue cap bottle and place the bottle on a stirring plate. Turn on the stirring, and make sure it's mixing well.

steps.title: Add the following to the bluecap bottle
steps.instruction: Add the following to the bluecap bottle: 40g/L yeast extract 1.3 g/L MgSO 4 ·7H 2 O 50 g/L maltodextrin (DE ~ 12) 20 g/L NaH 2 PO 4 ·2H 2 O 6.7mL/L 2.0g/L Na 2 MoO 4 stock solution 6.7mL/L Trace metal solution 100μL/L Pluronic L-61

steps.title: Prepare a trace metal solution consisting of 4
steps.instruction: Prepare a trace metal solution consisting of 4.48g/L MnSO 4 ·H 2 O 3.33g/L FeCl 3 ·6H 2 O 0.625g/L CuSO 4 ·5H 2 O 7.12g/L ZnSO 4 ·7H 2 O Sterilize by filtration

steps.title: Fill a blue cap bottle to...
steps.instruction: Fill a blue cap bottle to ~80% of the desired final volume with MQ water.

steps.title: Make sure that all of the ingredients are dissolved
steps.instruction: Make sure that all of the ingredients are dissolved

steps.title: Add MQ water to the desired final volume
steps.instruction: Add MQ water to the desired final volume

steps.title: Sterilize by filtration The media easily...
steps.instruction: Sterilize by filtration The media easily clogs filters, so choose a 0.45μM vacuum bottle top filter for this step and be prepared to use a few filters per liter

steps.title: Store the media at 4 °C until needed
steps.instruction: Store the media at 4 °C until needed

steps.title: Inoculate between 3 mL to 50...
steps.instruction: Inoculate between 3 mL to 50 mL LB media with a single colony of the expression strain. Depending on the expression volume and overnight OD. The culture can be grown in in a 24-deepwell plate, a falcon tube or a shake flask

steps.title: Grow the strain at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Grow the strain at 37 °C Overnight Make sure to not incubate the overnight culture for longer than 16:00:00 . Using an overnight culture that has been incubating for longer than this, often results in non-reproducible results

steps.title: Prepare the desired volume of expression...
steps.instruction: Prepare the desired volume of expression media in the desired vessel Vessel and media volume has a massive influence on the final protein titers. In our experience, 24-deepwell plates in an incubator with a large shaking amplitude and CSTRs work well, while shake flasks give low protein yields. This is likely highly dependant on the equipment (e.g. incubators and the shape and baffle pattern of the shake flasks), and thus should be optimized for the individual labs

steps.title: Inoculate the expression media to an OD 600 of 0
steps.instruction: Inoculate the expression media to an OD 600 of 0.1

steps.title: Incubate the expression culture at 20...
steps.instruction: Incubate the expression culture at 20 °C with 250 RPM shaking between 48:00:00 and 72:00:00 The expression temperature and duration is dependant on the target protein, although the specified values seem to be a good starting point in our experience

steps.title: Harvest the culture by centrifuging at...
steps.instruction: Harvest the culture by centrifuging at 6000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes Depending on what the samples are for, the supernatant from the first centrifugation can additionally be centrifuged at 16000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes to clear out cell debris and other smaller contaminants

steps.title: Keep the sample On ice when...
steps.instruction: Keep the sample On ice when working with it and at -20 °C for storage
